articles.title: Staff at Fallout: New Vegas Developer Obsidian Reportedly Left Unsure How 'Huge List of Projects' Can Continue After Xbox Layoffs Hit Hard
'She'd Be Great as Mystique': Obsession Star Inde Navarette Confirms Meeting With X-Men Director Jake Schreier, as Marvel Fans Discuss Who She's Likely to Play

filtered_articles.title: LEGO Set Leaks Reveal First Pokémon Minifigures, Including Professor Oak and Red, Plus Pikachu and Eevee
filtered_articles.description: The first LEGO Pokémon set to include minifigures, featuring Professor Oak and Red, will debut later this year, leaked images have revealed.
